note: Type-load-bearing static spread-merge of six imported MIME-definition records. `MimeType = keyof typeof mimes` and `FileExtension = (typeof mimes)[MimeType]["extensions"][number]` derive the package's core union types directly from this literal. canImportUtils=false so any replacement is raw effect/Struct or effect/Record. A runtime merge helper would erase the precise literal-keyed type inference; human must confirm the union types still infer identically (likely keep as-is) before remediating.
